title: Lever Ledger Record (cross-session memory)
description: One learned lesson: a structural case signature -> which surface/lever surfaced which mediator, with corroboration and guardrail status. Persistent, committed. NEVER stores a patient-specific numeric value (guardrail: no imputation). See src/lever_ledger.py.

case_signature.description: Structural only: bands, a comorbidity name-set, and which mediating data are flagged absent. No numeric patient values.

lever.description: The format/variable/harness edit that was applied.

provenance.description: session id + turn / run that produced it.
